transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HealthLink Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if my plan covers physical therapy at Willow Creek Rehab.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, can you tell me your plan name so I can check that for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's the Meridian Silver PPO plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Willow Creek Rehab is listed as in-network for physical therapy under Meridian Silver PPO, with a $30 copay per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Can you set up an appointment with Dr. Ellen Ford there? I've seen her before.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Before I do that, do you have a preferred day or time that works best for you?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I don't have real-time availability for Dr. Ford pulled up right now, so I need to check with the clinic directly before confirming anything.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That's fine, just let me know.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll call Willow Creek Rehab and confirm Dr. Ford's morning openings next week, then follow up with you by phone.
